title: selaginella tyleri
intro: Selaginella tyleri, also known as spikemoss, is a type of fern-like plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its small, scale-like leaves and ability to thrive in a variety of environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella tyleri include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Selaginella tyleri is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
